feed.title: NVO987 Research Infrastructure
feed.subtitle: Decentralized research infrastructure across Web2 and Web3 environments

entry.title: NVO987 Infrastructure Overview
entry.summary: Overview of the NVO987 decentralized research infrastructure, including identity verification systems, knowledge domains, and distributed publication nodes.

entry.title: Decentralized Identity Architecture
entry.summary: Documentation of the decentralized identity architecture used within the NVO987 research infrastructure.

entry.title: NVO987 Knowledge Domain
entry.summary: Knowledge domain containing research documentation, analytical publications and structured knowledge resources.
